name: Tex-Mex Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian peeled tomatoes, drained (14 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together 3/4 cup crushed crackers, creamed corn, tomatoes, chilies, onion, bell pepper, garlic, eggs, salt, and chili powder with a fork until well blended.
2. Add ground beef and knead with your hands until mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a lightly buttered, deep 3-quart baking dish.
4. Sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup crackers over top and dot with butter.
5. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for about 1 hour, until the center springs back when pressed with a finger.
6. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
